subcodes.first_line: The world hath been renewed through the manifestation of the Ancient King in His Most Great Name, yet the people perceive it not. The Hidden One hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تجدد العالم بظهور مالک القدم باسمه الاعظم ولکن القوم لایعرفون قد ظهر المکنون و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
